menu_path_target_label: Follow the menu path "{path_display}". Which candidate letter marks the final command?
Which candidate letter is the final command reached by the menu path "{path_display}"?
For the menu path "{path_display}", select the letter on the final command.
Trace the menu path "{path_display}" and choose the candidate letter on its final command.
What candidate letter marks the command at the end of "{path_display}"?
sidebar_tree_target_label: Follow the sidebar path "{path_display}". Which candidate letter marks the final item?
Which candidate letter is the final item reached by the sidebar path "{path_display}"?
For the sidebar path "{path_display}", select the letter on the final item.
Trace the sidebar path "{path_display}" and choose the candidate letter on its final item.
What candidate letter marks the item at the end of "{path_display}"?
ribbon_group_command_label: In ribbon tab "{path_parent}" and group "{path_child}", which candidate letter marks "{command_label}"?
Which candidate letter marks "{command_label}" in the "{path_parent}" ribbon tab under "{path_child}"?
For ribbon path "{path_display}", select the letter on the command.
Trace the ribbon path "{path_display}" and choose the candidate letter on the command.
What candidate letter marks "{command_label}" in ribbon path "{path_display}"?
same_group_target_label: Which candidate letter marks the other control in the same visible group as candidate "{reference_label}"?
Candidate "{reference_label}" is in one visible group. Which other candidate letter is in that same group?
What candidate letter is in the same visible group as candidate "{reference_label}", excluding "{reference_label}"?
Choose the candidate letter on the other control inside candidate "{reference_label}"'s group.
Which lettered control shares its visible group with candidate "{reference_label}"?

global.json_output_contract: Return a JSON object with "annotation" and "answer".
global.json_output_contract_answer_only: Return a JSON object with "answer" only.

query:menu_path_target_label.object_description: a desktop application navigation screen with menu paths and lettered candidate commands
query:menu_path_target_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the selected candidate letter
query:menu_path_target_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the bounding box of the selected target command

query:sidebar_tree_target_label.object_description: a desktop application navigation screen with a sidebar tree and lettered candidate items
query:sidebar_tree_target_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the selected candidate letter
query:sidebar_tree_target_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the bounding box of the selected target item

query:ribbon_group_command_label.object_description: a desktop application navigation screen with ribbon tabs, ribbon groups, and lettered candidate commands
query:ribbon_group_command_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the selected candidate letter
query:ribbon_group_command_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the bounding box of the selected target command

query:same_group_target_label.object_description: a desktop application navigation screen with grouped lettered candidate controls
query:same_group_target_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the selected candidate letter
query:same_group_target_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the bounding box of the selected target control
